User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile containing authentication details, balance, KYC, and card activation states.

username.description: The full name or display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user (primary identifier).

hideBalance.description: Whether the balance display is obscured in the UI.

avatarUrl.description: Avatar character, emoji or base64 data string.

joinedAt.description: ISO date-time or formatted string when user registered.

darkMode.description: Visual preference for dark interface mode.

kycStatus.description: The verification status of the user.

kycPlan.description: The selected KYC partner daily join plan.

kycPaymentProof.description: Base64 encoded string of user's payment transfer slip.

cardActivationProof.description: Base64 encoded payment slip for card activation.

isBanned.description: Indicates if the user is suspended from system operations.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Financial ledger transactions including deposits, transfers, and utility payments.

title.description: The title or action name of the transaction.

recipient.description: Optional details of recipient or target account.

JoinedCompany.title: Joined Revenue Pool
JoinedCompany.description: A revenue sharing pool the user has partnered with.

companyId.description: The target company partner unique ID.

joinedAt.description: ISO date-time when the user entered this pool.

SystemConfig.title: System Configuration
SystemConfig.description: Global administration settings including banking information and support handles.

accountNumber.description: The company settlement bank account number.

accountName.description: The registered legal entity name of bank account.

fee.description: The base KYC registration and verification fee.

supportLink.description: Direct URL to support staff (e.g. Telegram link).

users/{email}.description: User profile document keyed by lowercased email address.

users/{email}/transactions/{transactionI.description: Chronological list of all financial actions completed by the user.

users/{email}/joinedCompanies/{companyId.description: Passive income revenue pools the user is currently subscribed to.

system/config.description: Global settings editable by administrators, visible to all authenticated users.
